_comment: Example company-watchlist scanner config. Copy to config/sourced-scan.json (gitignored) and fill in YOUR targets — Rolester ships no role, geography, or company defaults so a zero-config install stays domain-neutral. Used by `npm run scan:sourced`.

positive: <role keyword to keep, e.g. your target title>
negative: <role keyword to drop, e.g. a level/specialty you don't want>
